hero.headline: Your competitors are already using AI.
hero.subtitle: I help freelancers and small businesses save hours every week, serve customers better, and grow faster — with AI that actually fits your workflow.

painPoints.title: Sound familiar?

items.title: Drowning in repetitive tasks
items.description: Emails, invoices, scheduling, follow-ups — you spend more time on admin than on actual work.

items.title: Can't afford to hire
items.description: You need help, but another employee is too expensive. What if AI could handle the boring stuff?

items.title: AI feels overwhelming
items.description: ChatGPT, copilots, automations — where do you even start? You need someone who just makes it work.

items.title: Falling behind competitors
items.description: Other businesses are already using AI to move faster. Every month you wait, the gap grows.

painPoints.nudge: Sound familiar? You're not alone — and there's an easy fix.

useCases.title: What AI can do for your business
useCases.subtitle: Real use cases, real results. And this is just the beginning.

categories.title: Your Personal AI Assistant
categories.subtitle: An AI that knows your business, your tone, your processes — available 24/7.

items.title: Answer questions like you would
items.description: Train your AI on your knowledge base and way of working. It responds to customers and partners exactly as you would — even at 3 AM.

items.title: Remember everything, forget nothing
items.description: Your AI remembers every conversation, preference, and client detail. No more digging through emails or notes.

items.title: Think along and suggest
items.description: Brainstorm ideas, draft proposals, prepare meeting summaries, or research a topic — your AI handles it.

items.title: Speak your language
items.description: Your assistant adapts to your brand voice, jargon, and style. It's not generic AI — it's your AI.

items.title: Grow with you
items.description: Start simple, then expand to scheduling, follow-ups, reporting, and more. ROI visible within 90 days.

items.title: Reachable via voice, chat & email
items.description: Talk, type, or email — your AI responds on every channel. Via WhatsApp, Slack, voice, or just your browser.

items.title: Custom daily briefing
items.description: Every morning a summary of your inbox, calendar, and open tasks. Start your day with clarity instead of chaos.

categories.title: Customer Service & Communication
categories.subtitle: Never miss a customer question again. Respond faster, resolve more, retain better.

items.title: 24/7 customer response without extra staff
items.description: AI chatbots handle up to 79% of routine questions independently. Response times drop 60%, satisfaction jumps 40%.

items.title: Less pressure on your team
items.description: AI handles repetitive inquiries — order status, pricing, FAQs — reducing workload by up to 70%.

items.title: Higher customer retention
items.description: Businesses using AI for service see 20% more retention and €3.50 return for every €1 invested.

items.title: Automatic follow-ups
items.description: AI sends timely follow-ups after purchases or appointments. 18% more repeat customers from follow-ups alone.

items.title: Multilingual support
items.description: AI answers customer questions in Dutch, English, German, and more — no need for extra staff per language.

categories.title: Marketing & Content Creation
categories.subtitle: Produce more content, reach more people, spend less time — without hiring a team.

items.title: Blogs, posts & newsletters in a fraction of the time
items.description: Blog creation drops from 8-10 hours to under 2 hours. Double your output without hiring.

items.title: Personalized email campaigns
items.description: AI writes, personalizes, and optimizes email sequences. 20% cost reduction, 80% revenue growth.

items.title: Social media on autopilot
items.description: Automated scheduling, captions, hashtag optimization. A full AI marketing stack for just €90-€150/month.

items.title: SEO content that gets found
items.description: AI generates optimized headings, descriptions, and keyword strategies. 30-60% faster content production.

items.title: Consistent brand identity
items.description: Train AI on your brand voice and style. Every piece of content stays on-brand, from Instagram to white papers.

items.title: Effortless A/B testing
items.description: AI generates multiple variants of headlines, CTAs, and emails. Automatically test which version performs best.

categories.title: Sales & Lead Generation
categories.subtitle: Find more leads, respond faster, close more deals — with less manual effort.

items.title: Qualify leads automatically
items.description: AI scores leads on behavior and fit. 36% more sales-ready leads, 23% higher conversion rate.

items.title: Respond faster = close more
items.description: AI-automated responses are 70% faster. One company closed 31% more deals just by responding in minutes.

items.title: Smart product recommendations
items.description: AI suggests products based on behavior. 15% larger carts, 12% better retention, ROI in 45 days.

items.title: Proposals in minutes, not hours
items.description: Proposal writing drops from 2 hours to 20 minutes. That's 8+ hours saved per month on just 5 proposals.

items.title: CRM enrichment on autopilot
items.description: AI fills in client profiles with public data, past interactions, and social media. Always a complete picture before your sales call.

items.title: Pipeline forecasting
items.description: AI predicts which deals are likely to close and where your pipeline has gaps. Adjust course before it's too late.

categories.title: Administration & Finance
categories.subtitle: Stop drowning in paperwork. Let AI handle the boring stuff.

items.title: Automatic bookkeeping & invoicing
items.description: AI extracts data from invoices, categorizes expenses, and schedules payments. 93% of accounting pros already use AI.

items.title: 7 extra weeks per employee per year
items.description: That's the measured productivity gain from AI in accounting. Time shifts from data entry to strategy.

items.title: Cash flow predictions
items.description: AI analyzes patterns to predict cash flow, flag shortfalls, and suggest action. Fewer surprises, better decisions.

items.title: Fewer errors, better compliance
items.description: AI reduces data entry errors and keeps records audit-ready. Cleaner books, less stress.

items.title: Automatic expense reports
items.description: Snap a photo of a receipt, AI extracts amount, category, and VAT. Expense report done in seconds instead of minutes.

categories.title: Scheduling & Operations
categories.subtitle: Reclaim 5-10 hours every week by letting AI manage your calendar and operations.

items.title: Book appointments without back-and-forth
items.description: AI handles booking, confirmations, and rescheduling. One clinic reduced no-shows from 18% to just 6%.

items.title: Smart staff scheduling
items.description: AI optimizes schedules based on demand, availability, and skills. Up to 25% lower operational costs.

items.title: Automatic reminders & follow-ups
items.description: No more missed appointments or forgotten follow-ups. AI sends reminders via email, SMS, or chat.

items.title: Track projects & tasks
items.description: AI tracks deadlines, flags bottlenecks, and prioritizes your to-do list. Save 5-10 hours weekly.

items.title: Travel time & route optimization
items.description: AI schedules appointments back-to-back and accounts for travel time. Less driving, more client time.

categories.title: Research & Intelligence
categories.subtitle: Know your market, watch competitors, spot opportunities — without hours of reading.

items.title: Market research in minutes
items.description: AI scans and summarizes industry reports, news, and trends. Save 1-2 hours per client on research.

items.title: Competitor analysis on autopilot
items.description: AI monitors competitor pricing, products, and marketing. Actionable summaries instead of evenings on their site.

items.title: Data-driven decisions
items.description: AI analyzes your sales trends, customer behavior, and seasonal patterns. 15% less overstock, 10% more sales.

items.title: Spot trends before competitors
items.description: AI identifies emerging trends from social media, search data, and news. Be first to act, not last to react.

items.title: Make your internal knowledge searchable
items.description: AI makes all your documents, manuals, and processes searchable with plain language questions. Stop searching, start asking.

categories.title: HR & People Operations
categories.subtitle: From hiring to onboarding and daily HR tasks — faster and more personal with AI.

items.title: Job postings in minutes
items.description: AI writes compelling job descriptions based on requirements and your company culture. 75% faster than manual writing.

items.title: CV screening at scale
items.description: AI evaluates resumes for relevant experience, skills, and culture fit. Save hours per vacancy on initial screening.

items.title: Automated onboarding
items.description: New hires get an AI buddy that answers questions about processes, tools, and company policies. Productive faster.

items.title: Leave management & schedule changes
items.description: Employees request time off via chat. AI checks availability, adjusts the schedule, and confirms.

items.title: Measure employee satisfaction
items.description: AI sends short pulse surveys and analyzes satisfaction trends. Catch early signals before they become problems.

howIWork.title: How it works
howIWork.subtitle: From first conversation to real results in three steps

steps.label: We talk
steps.title: Free discovery call
steps.description: In 30 minutes we explore your business, your bottlenecks, and where AI can make the biggest impact. No jargon, no obligations.

items.title: Custom AI implementation
items.description: I set up AI solutions tailored to your workflow — connected to your tools, trained on your data, ready to use.

items.title: On-site AI training
items.description: I come to your office and teach you and your team how to use AI effectively — with real examples from your daily work.

steps.label: You grow
steps.title: Results from day one
steps.description: You save time, serve customers better, and focus on what matters. I stay available for questions and fine-tuning.

about.title: I'm not a big consultancy.
about.description: I believe every freelancer and small business deserves access to AI — without the enterprise price tag or the tech jargon. I work hands-on, keep things personal, and won't leave until it actually works for you.
about.aboutPhotoAlt: Founder of AIvoorU - AI specialist for freelancers and SMBs in the Netherlands

items.question: I'm not technical at all. Is that a problem?
items.answer: Not at all — that's exactly why I exist. I handle everything from setup to configuration. You just tell me what you need, and I make it work.

items.question: How quickly will I see results?
items.answer: Most clients notice a difference within the first week. Measurable ROI — like time saved or faster response times — is typically visible within 90 days.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Yes. I only work with trusted AI services and ensure your data isn't used to train models. Privacy and confidentiality are always a priority.

items.question: What if it doesn't work for my business?
items.answer: During the free discovery call, we figure out together if AI is a good fit. I'm honest — if AI won't help your situation, I'll tell you upfront.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: Every solution is custom, so the price depends on what you need. During the free discovery call I'll map that out and give you an honest estimate.

items.question: Do I need special hardware or software?
items.answer: Usually not. Most solutions work with your existing tools — Gmail, Calendar, Drive, your CRM. If hardware is needed, I'll advise you.

items.question: Can I see how it works first?
items.answer: Of course. In the free discovery call I walk you through concrete examples for your situation, so you know exactly what AI can do for you.

items.question: What happens after setup?
items.answer: You get hands-on support to make sure everything runs smoothly. I'm available for questions, tweaks, and fine-tuning. I don't disappear after delivery.

ctaBanner.title: Let's talk about your business
ctaBanner.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute call. I'll show you exactly how AI can save you time and help you grow. No obligations, no jargon.

footer.tagline: Custom AI solutions for freelancers and small businesses.
